summary: Navigation step list overflow fix is correct and well-tested. Adds overflow-x-auto, shrink-0, whitespace-nowrap, and min-w-0 to the step indicator, plus upgrades to semantic nav/ol/li markup with aria-label. All 13 ProjectSetup tests pass. Pre-existing test failures in NotificationBar, PlanPhase, and DependencyGraph are unrelated to this change.
